queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the determinants of default associated with higher requested credit amounts and their contribution to increased credit risk.
Empirical analysis of credit risk drivers related to loan duration in months and their mitigating effect on default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating impact of lacking a recorded savings account status on credit default probability and borrower financial behavior.
